title: DLRS Consent Metadata
description: Structured consent metadata for a DLRS record. Mirrors the consent block inside manifest.json#/consent and is also used for standalone consent_metadata.json files.

consent_version.description: Version of the consent statement template that was signed.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which consent was captured.

expires_at.description: Optional ISO-8601 timestamp at which consent expires. Null = no scheduled expiry.

withdrawal_endpoint.description: URL or mailto: that accepts withdrawal requests for this record. MUST be reachable.

allowed_scopes.description: Scopes that are explicitly allowed by this consent.

scopes.description: Free-form additional scope tags (deprecated; prefer allowed_scopes).

separate_biometric_consent.description: True if a SEPARATE biometric consent was obtained (required for voice/avatar cloning or storage of S3+ assets).

guardian_consent.description: True if guardian/legal-representative consent applies (required for minors).

evidence_refs.description: Repo-relative paths to consent evidence (signed statement, signature manifest, consent video pointer, ID verification pointer).

signer.description: Information about the party that signed the consent.
